composites.name: spatial-containment
composites.description: Study 2 — the autopoiesis of containment on a 1-D lattice. Interior content DIFFUSES and would ddisperse into the medium; the self-produced membrane GATES the cross-boundary flux (permeability falls as the membrane grows), so the individual is held together against diffusion. The membrane is built by the metabolism it contains, and decays when starved — containment is precarious, the spatial edition. ``membrane_on=false`` is the discriminating no-membrane negative control; ``fed=false`` starves it.

fed.description: Metabolism runs (produces interior content + grows the membrane). false starves it.

membrane_on.description: The self-produced membrane gates the boundary flux. false = the no-membrane control.

composites.name: adaptive-chemotaxis
composites.description: Study 3 — adaptive chemotaxis: where life becomes mind. A population of run-and-tumble agents in a nutrient gradient senses the local food and tumbles less when nutrient is rising (bacterial chemotaxis); nutrient sustains the viability that keeps each agent alive. A chemotactic agent climbs the gradient, finds food, and survives; a blind agent (``chemotactic=false``) random-walks, starves, and dissolves. The gradient is MEANINGFUL from the perspective of the precarious identity — sense-making, agency in service of self-maintenance.

chemotactic.description: Sense the gradient and bias tumbling up it. false = the blind-motile control.

seed.description: RNG seed for the agent ensemble + run-and-tumble draws (deterministic per seed).

composites.name: membrane-metabolism-loop
composites.description: The minimal membrane/metabolism co-construction loop — a precarious, self-bounding identity that emerges from the molecular domain. Metabolism makes lipids; the membrane grows by incorporating them and decays without them; the volume is DERIVED from the membrane (the boundary emerges, never declared) and couples back into the concentration the bimolecular lipid step runs on. Supply (rate=0 starves) is the only boundary inflow.

supply_rate.description: Boundary nutrient inflow. 0 starves the cell — the identity then dissipates.

composites.name: growth-division
composites.description: Study 4 — growth & division: one individual becomes a heterogeneous population. The precarious individual grows as its (abstracted) autopoietic loop runs and, past a size threshold, DIVIDES into two daughters. The membrane is partitioned with noise so daughters differ; a heritable trait is inherited with mutation so lineages DIVERSIFY over generations. Division is precarious — a daughter that inherits too little membrane to maintain itself dissolves. Starve it (``supply=0``) and the lineage collapses: the no-self-maintenance control.

supply.description: Per-step membrane growth (self-maintenance). 0 collapses the lineage (negative control).

seed.description: RNG seed for the division/partition/mutation/cull draws (deterministic per seed).
